# elodea

The goal of elodea is to clean and standardise published GBIF
checklists. With elodea you can prepare checklists on alien species to
create a unified checklist.

## Installation

You can install the development version of elodea from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("onestop-project/elodea")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`check_taxa()`](https://onestop-project.github.io/elodea/reference/check_taxa.md)
  : Checks taxa
- [`filter_data()`](https://onestop-project.github.io/elodea/reference/filter_data.md)
  : Filter data
- [`get_distributions()`](https://onestop-project.github.io/elodea/reference/get_distributions.md)
  : Get distributions
- [`get_taxa()`](https://onestop-project.github.io/elodea/reference/get_taxa.md)
  : Get taxa from checklist
